name: nmcc-theme-testing
description: JavaScript and automated testing for the NMCC WordPress Block Theme.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -s first "php -S 127.0.0.1:8000 -t .wordpress_local" "browser-sync start --proxy '127.0.0.1:8000' --files 'theme.json, templates/**/*.html, parts/**/*.html, assets/**/*.css, assets/**/*.js, *.php'"
